zh.lifeSummary: Lettice Fenn是Fenn的女兒，於1645年出生在英國戴文德利。她於1665年2月12日與Constable George Bruen Radford Esq.在英國戴文結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1687年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州享年42歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Lettice Fenn是Fenn的女儿，于1645年出生在英国戴文德利。她于1665年2月12日与Constable George Bruen Radford Esq.在英国戴文结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1687年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州享年42岁。

nameMeanings.name: Fenn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: topographic name in south-east England for someone who lived in a low-lying marshy area, from Middle English fen(ne) ‘fen, marsh’ (Old English fenn).
South German: topographic name from Old High German fenni, Middle Low German and Old Frisian fenne ‘bog’. Compare Fehn .
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surname 馮, see   Feng   1.

variants.name: Fehn
meanings: North German: topographic name for someone who lived by a bog or marsh, from fehn ‘bog’.

Norwegian: habitational name from any of the three farms in southeastern Norway named Fen, probably from Old Norse Fávin, of which the second element is vin ‘meadow’; the first element is unexplained.

variants.name: Fenner
meanings: English: from Middle English fen(ne) ‘fen, marsh’ (Old English fenn) + -er, a topographic name for someone who lived in or by a marsh or fen. Fenn Place in Worth in Sussex had owners called atte Fenne, who in the time of King Henry VI (1421–1471) apparently changed their name to Fenner. See Fenn .
English: variant of Fainer, from Middle English feiner, fener ‘haymonger, one who sells hay’ (Old French fenier), or perhaps a nickname from Middle English feiner ‘inventor; hypocrite’.
South German and Swiss German: occupational name for an ensign or standard bearer, from Middle High German vener, an agent derivative of Middle High German vane ‘flag’. See also Fenrich .

variants.name: Fenning
meanings: English: topographic name from Middle English fen(ne) ‘fen, marsh’ (Old English fenn) + -ing, for someone who lived by a fen or marsh. Compare Fenn .

variants.name: Finner
meanings: German: topographic name from an agent derivative of Old High German fenni, Middle Low German and Old Frisian fenne ‘bog’ (see Fenn ).
German: ethnic name for a Finn (see   Finn   4).

nameMeanings.name: Lettice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the medieval vernacular form of the Latin name   Laetitia .  It was in use in Britain in the Middle Ages, but then fell out of use until revived by the Victorians. It is now once again out of fashion.

en.lifeSummary: Lettice Fenn was born in 1645, in Chudleigh, Devon, England as the daughter of Fenn. She married Constable George Bruen Radford Esq. on 12 February 1665, in Devon, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1687, in Virginia, British Colonial America, at the age of 42.

fr.lifeSummary: Lettice Fenn est née en 1645, à Chudleigh, Devon, Angleterre, fille de Fenn. Elle a épousé Constable George Bruen Radford Esq. le 12 février 1665, à Devon, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1687, à Virginie, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 42 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Lettice Fenn wurde 1645 in Chudleigh, Devon, England, als Tochter von Fenn geboren. Sie hat am 12. Februar 1665 in Devon, England Constable George Bruen Radford Esq. geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1687 im Alter von 42 Jahren in Virginia, British Colonial America.

it.lifeSummary: Lettice Fenn è nata il nel 1645 nel Chudleigh, Devon, England come figlia di Fenn. Lei sposato Constable George Bruen Radford Esq. il 12 febbraio 1665, nel Devon, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1687, nel Virginia, British Colonial America, all'età di 42 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lettice Fennは1645年にイギリスデボンチウドレイグでFennの娘として生まれた。1665年2月12日にイギリスデボンでConstable George Bruen Radford Esq.と結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1687年にイギリス植民地アメリカバージニア州で42歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lettice Fenn(은)는 1645년 영국 데폰 c후들리에서 Fenn의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1665년 2월 12일 영국 데폰에서 Constable George Bruen Radford Esq.(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1687년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주에서 42세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Lettice Fenn родилась в 1645 г. в местности чудлиг, девон, Англия. Её отца звали Fenn. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Constable George Bruen Radford Esq. 12 февраля 1665 г. в местности девон, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1687 г. в местности Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 42 лет.
